params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-to-1 multiplexer with a reset functionality. When the reset signal is high, the output will be forced to the highest input value. When reset is low, the output selects one of the four 4-bit input lines (in0, in1, in2, or in3) based on the 2-bit select signal (sel). The selected input is determined as follows: if sel is 00, output in0; if sel is 01, output in1; if sel is 10, output in2; if sel is 11, output in3.
